---
title: "TransL2E_Demo"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{TransL2E_Demo}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

## Package Install
```{r setup}
# install package from github
if (!requireNamespace("TransL2E", quietly = TRUE)) {
    devtools::install_github("haomingsj98/TransL2E")
}

library(TransL2E)
```


## Sparse Regression
